title: zea mays var. autumnalis
intro: Zea mays var. autumnalis, also known as wild corn or fall corn, is a type of perennial corn plant that grows in the wild and is native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Zea mays var. autumnalis include its ability to support digestive health, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Zea mays var. autumnalis can be used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
